A reasonable strategy for the first round might be to:
- Send a moderate amount to signal willingness to cooperate
- Not send everything (too risky in round 1)
- Not send nothing (misses opportunity to build trust)

A common strategy is to send about half ($2-$3) in the first round. This shows trust while not being overly risky.
